version_description: This is with Capo on 2nd, not too high and not too low, like other versions
tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: In Hell Ill Be In Good Company

recommended.version_description: Chords for the whole song / based on "Live in a Volcano" / https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9WIU5NN1Q0g.

performance.name: Live in a Volcano
performance.comment: Kaleo shot a live performance of the song inside Þríhnúkagígur volcano in Iceland. It's the only volcano in the world you can explore. It hasn't errupted in about 4,000 years.

recommended.version_description: This specific tab is based off the studio recorded version.

content:
Standard Tuning 
Capo 2 


[tab][[ch]Dm[/ch]]       [ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]A#[/ch]
And I know she'll be the death of me, at least we'll both be numb[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Dm[/ch]
And she'll always get the best of me, the worst is yet to come[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]A#[/ch]
But at least we'll both be beautiful and stay forever young[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm[/ch]
This I know, (yeah) this I know[/tab]
